ksa_text: Knowledge of sector-specific data protection and privacy regulations, including HIPAA health information requirements, SOX financial data standards, industry-specific compliance obligations, and cross-jurisdictional regulatory interactions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-014 (Security and Privacy/Knowledge) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.485, highest: O*NET at 0.485). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 1. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Domain-level data product ownership: data mesh principles, data contracts, domain model governance, inter-domain data agreements, and data product SLA management within a business domain.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.485, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Security and Privacy KSA (composite 0.485)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Domain Data Product Owner job postings does not surface this Security and Privacy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
